text: Two dog brushes to show you. I've got a normal dog brush and I've got the
Furminator. I'm going to show you the difference between these two brushes. So
I brush here, there's no hair falling off this dog whatsoever. Very little hair on
that brush, very little. The Furminator, this dog loves it. As you can see it's
like a snowfall. Look at this hair. The Furminator, dogs love it, you'll love it.
